documentation.content:
The 48-hour devnet stability watch has completed.

View the full report in Cloud Logging:
https://console.cloud.google.com/logs?project=objects-devnet&query=STABILITY_REPORT_COMPLETE

Uptime dashboard:
https://console.cloud.google.com/monitoring/uptime?project=objects-devnet

If all checks passed, proceed with A8 (quickstart README).
